metadata.title: My Blog
metadata.description: Technology as a tool, focused on frontend and AI, person as a service

sections.techArticlesDesc: Sharing notes on using technology and tools, including some DIY projects
sections.noteArchiveDesc: Continuously syncing personal Notion notes, archiving and referencing, providing training data for a personal private LLM
sections.thoughtExperimentsDesc: Sharing personal ideas and inspirations, covering everything from travel to reading, all aspects of personal worldview.
sections.moreExplorationsDesc: Sharing small tools and scripts developed to improve work efficiency or make life more interesting. Exploring the Person-as-a-Service (PAAS) model

recentPosts.title: Latest Thoughts
recentPosts.description: Sharing technical insights and development experiences

blogs.placeholder: Start writing... try the slash command
blogs.editorNote: You can edit and write here, or export. Content is temporarily stored locally — it won't be lost on your next visit from the same device, but you need to log in to upload.
